1509300002.korean: 설마, 광범위로 에너지를 내뿜는 방전을 일으킬 줄은…
1509300002.english: Surely you didn’t expect me to trigger a wide‑area energy discharge…

1509300004.korean: 그래도 케스토스 히마스는 지키는 데 성공했으니… 추격은 불필요하겠지요.
1509300004.english: At least we managed to protect Kestos Himas, so a pursuit isn’t necessary, I suppose.

1509300005.korean: 하지만… 조금 전의 방전으로 지하로 보내지던 에너지에 문제가 생겼습니다.
1509300005.english: But… the discharge a moment ago messed up the energy that was supposed to send us underground.

1509300006.english: Perhaps even Mother is affected as well.

1509300007.korean: 이게… 너희들이 말한 엠프레시스 하운드의 비장의 무기인가?
1509300007.english: Is this… the Empress Hound’s secret weapon you’ve been talking about?

1509300008.korean: 그렇지~ 이판사판 상황이나 탈출할 때 쓰면 아주 제격이지?
1509300008.english: Exactly~ It’s perfect for a desperate situation or a quick escape, right?

1509300009.korean: 예전에 오귀기아에 갔을 때도 이 방법으로 탈출했거든.
1509300009.english: We used this method to get out when we went to Oguigia before.

1509300010.korean:
대신 이걸 사용하면 바보니르는 당분간 움직일 수 없게 되고 정말로 바보가 되어버리지만…
젠장, 이 녀석 의외로 무겁네?
1509300010.english:
But if you use this, Barbonir will be immobilized for a while and actually become a fool…
Damn, this thing’s surprisingly heavy, huh?

1509300014.korean: 파프니르가 왜 그렇게 하기 싫어했는지 알 것 같군.
1509300014.english: I think I understand why Fafnir didn’t want to do that.

1509300015.korean:
아무튼 덕분에 살았어.
무사히 엡실론도 탈환했고.
1509300015.english: Anyway, thanks to you we survived. We also safely reclaimed Epsilon.

1509300016.korean: 엡실론 어때? 원래 몸으로 돌아갈 수 있겠어?
1509300016.english: How’s Epsilon? Do you think she can return to her original body?

1509300017.korean: 무리야… 완전히 접근할 수 있는 권한을 잃었어.
1509300017.english: It’s impossible… I’ve completely lost access rights.

1509300018.korean: 원래 몸으로 돌아가기 위해서는 다시 권한을 되찾아야 해.
1509300018.english: To get back to my original body, I need to regain those permissions.

1509300019.english: Is this as far as we can go…?

1509300020.english: We’ve achieved the goal of retrieving Epsilon’s body.

1509300021.korean: 우리의 현재 상태로는 더 이상 움직이기 힘들어.
1509300021.english: In our current condition, it’s hard to keep moving.

1509300022.korean: 이대로 모두 무사히 복귀하는 걸 목표로 할게.
1509300022.english: Let’s aim to get everyone back safely like this.

1509300023.english: Yumi, I’m sorry, but it’s okay, right?

1509300026.english: Maybe Omega was rescued by the Commander, huh?

1509300028.korean: 사령관은 지금 남성미 넘치는 멋진 남자거든.
1509300028.english: The Commander’s a handsome, manly guy right now.
